content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.productivity.focus_timer
FILE: cosmos/tools/productivity/focus_timer.py (314 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Focus Timer - Pomodoro-Style Productivity Timer

"Work smarter, not harder... unless you're a robot."

Features:
- Pomodoro technique (25/5 work/break cycles)
- Custom intervals
- Session tracking
- Break reminders
- Daily statistics

CLASSES:
- TimerState(Enum)
- FocusSession: A completed focus session.
- TimerConfig: Timer configuration.
- FocusTimer: Pomodoro-style focus timer.
  Methods: def configure(self, work_minutes: int=None, short_break_minutes: int=None, long_break_minutes: int=N
  Methods: def on_state_change(self, callback: Callable)
  Methods: async def start_work(self, task_label: str='')
  Methods: async def start_break(self, is_long: bool=False)
  Methods: async def pause(self)
  Methods: async def resume(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
